texto: The whole crowd interrupted and told him, 'No, we won't let you go. You have worked hard for our rights and you can't quit now.''Then,' said Riel, 'if I must, I will desert.''If you desert, we will desert with you.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Gabriel Dumont sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “The whole crowd interrupted and told him, 'No, we won't let you go. You have worked hard for our …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, loyalty, desert, útil em momentos de trabalho e reflexao.
